## Summary

What changed, and which trainer workflow does it affect?

## Agent Review

- [ ] Trainer Stories Agent checked or not relevant
- [ ] Product Reality Agent checked or not relevant
- [ ] UX Designer Agent checked or not relevant
- [ ] Test Pilot / Functional QA Agent checked or not relevant
- [ ] Portfolio Reviewer Agent checked or not relevant

## SDD / Architecture

- [ ] SDD updated or not needed
- [ ] ADR updated or not needed
- [ ] Risk register updated or not needed
- [ ] README or demo instructions updated or not needed

## Verification

- [ ] Backend pytest: `cd backend && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest`
- [ ] Frontend lint: `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- [ ] Frontend typecheck: `cd frontend && npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Frontend unit tests: `cd frontend && npm run test`
- [ ] Frontend build: `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Frontend e2e: `cd frontend && npm run e2e`
- [ ] Local quality gate: `npm run quality`
- [ ] Manual browser QA when relevant

## Risk And Rollback

Known risks, migrations, deployment/env changes, and rollback plan.

## Screenshots / Evidence

Add desktop/mobile screenshots or a short clip for UI changes.
